case_title: MOISES ORTIZ GOMEZ VS. BEN GEFFEN

docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO DEFENDANT BEN GEFFEN ON OCT-17-2002 OFF CALENDAR; NO FILED, NO APPEARANCES

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BEN GEFFEN MOTION, PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 473, TO VACATE LABOR COMMISSIONER'S AWARD ENTERED ON 11/28/01; TO VACATE THE DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED 3/20/02 ON THE LABOR COMMISSIONER'S AWARD AGAINST DEFENDANT; TO VACATE THE 09/05/02 DECISION OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER DENYING DEFENDANT'S APPLICATION FOR RELIEF; FOR AN ORDER PERMITTING THE FILING OF AN ANSWER TO THE COMPLAINT, AND FOR A TRIAL DE NOVO IN THE SUPERIOR COURT: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING (GRANT MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT TO FILE TRIAL DE NOVO, POST $11,000.00 BOND, AND COMPLY WITH MANDATES OF LABOR SEC. 98.2(B)). BOND TO BE POSTED IN 10 DAYS. (302/AJR/PB) COURT REPORTER PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR #1193

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-12-2003 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-20-2003 Set For Trial On May-12-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION To Vacate Labor Commissioner'S Award Entered On 11/28/01; To Vacate The Default Judgment Entered 3/20/02 On The Labor Commissioner'S Award Against Defendant, Et Al.
Off Calendar Nov-14-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BEN GEFFEN MOTION, Pursuant To CCP Section 473, To Vacate Labor Commissioner's Award Entered On 11/28/01; To Vacate The Default Judgment Entered 3/20/02 On The Labor Commissioner's Award Against Defendant; To Vacate The 09/05/02 Decision Of The Labor Commissioner Denying Defendant's Application For Relief; For An Order Permitting The Filing Of An Answer To The Complaint, And For A Trial De Novo In The Superior Court:
APPEAR: Tomas E. Margain, Esq. 865-9515 for pltf & opposing party; Lawrence W. Fasano, Jr., Esq. 956-8800 for deft & moving party; Rachel Folberg, Esq. 703-5300 for Labor Commissioner.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (GRANT MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT TO FILE TRIAL DE NOVO, POST $11,000.00 BOND, AND COMPLY WITH MANDATES OF LABOR SEC. 98.2(B)). Bond to be posted in 10 days. (302/AJR/PB) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-17-2002 Off Calendar
